doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 governs multijurisdictional practice with different subsection structure and content, not the paralegal-supervision and "practice of law" definitions presented here.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with subsections on temporary/systematic practice and in-house counsel, not the paraphrased definitions and paralegal-supervision provisions shown here.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 governs multijurisdictional practice with different subsection structure and content, not the paralegal-supervision and "practice of law" definitions presented here.
